title: Evaluating SageMath-Augmented LLM Agents for Computational and Experimental Mathematics
summary: Evaluating SageMath-Augmented LLM Agents for Computational and Experimental Mathematics
whyItMatters: Recent advances in AI for Mathematics have focused largely on autoformalization and theorem proving, leaving the role of Computer Algebra Systems (CAS) in agentic LLM workflows underexplored. We propose a ReAct-style agentic setup that combines LLM reasoning with verifiable feedback from SageMath, together with Context7 for the up-to-date documentation. We…
